'''Kolor Delan''' was the founder and leader of [[Pendarran's Revenge]], an armed organization that fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Kolor's father, [[Gendal Delan]] was the leader of the [[Pendarran Warriors]], who fought with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] and the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. However, the Pendarran Warriors were exterminated in the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. This led Kolor to hate the Empire and he formed [[Pendarran's Revenge|his own group]], which was named after his father's.

Pendarran's Revenge occasionally aided the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], however, after the Empire's [[Battle of Endor/Legends|defeat]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Kolor became hostile to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was unknown if Kolor held a grudge against someone in the government, or if someone hired Pendarran's Revenge to act against the fledgling government.
